name: Minted Split and Fresh Pea Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place split peas and water in a saucepan over medium heat. Simmer until tender, about 30 minutes.
2. Add peas and continue simmering until they are cooked, 6-7 minutes.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Transfer peas, water, salt, and pepper to a food processor. Process until smooth.
5. Serve hot or chill and serve.
